prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-ELECTRICKEYBOARD-RED-TT Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Tycho Tyke Kids Electronic Keyboard Organ Musical Instrument Toy - Red Description: The Musical Star Electronic Keyboard Set is a excellent and educational kids toy that promotes developmental learning skills which makes this item a great addition to any toy collection. The keyboard feature buttons that make animal sounds, a record button, musical instrument sounds, flashing lights and rhythms.

Each instrument is constructed of durable plastic and is safe for all kids at least 3 years old. The keyboard even has a top carry handle for easy transportation.

This rockin' set is a wonderful gift idea for young children. Search Terms: musical toys rockstar kids keyboard light up educational Features: - PROMOTES DEVELOPMENTAL LEARNING: Your child will learn basic musical notes and animal sounds with this fun, light up electronic organ keyboard - LIGHT UP & SOUND: Hours and fun and learning with attention grabbing lights and sounds as well as a record button for playback and demo songs - CONVENIENT CARRY HANDLE: Take it on the go for a play date or when you are on the road with the easy carry handle - MAKES A GREAT GIFT: Give this gift to promote a love for music, animals, and creativity - Durable Plastic | Safe for Kids At Least 3 Years Old === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Red Electronic Keyboard Organ Musical Toy

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products Red Kids Electronic Keyboard Organ Toy

anthropic.title_differentiation: Light Up Keys, Animal Sounds, Record And Playback, Educational Learning, Carry Handle, Ages 3

openai.title_differentiation: Light Up Sounds, Animal Voices, Record And Playback, Demo Songs, Carry Handle, Durable Plastic, Ages 3 And Up
